message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 25
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor User
participant "pub.com" as Pub
participant "prebid.js" as Prebid
participant "prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js" as SSPMod
participant "SSPs" as SSPs
participant "DSPs" as DSPs
participant "gam.js" as GAM
participant "GAM/AdX" as AdX

User -> Pub : 1. navigates browser to pub.com
activate Pub

Pub -> Prebid : 2. load, configure, execute prebid.js
activate Prebid

Prebid -> SSPMod : 3. invoke SSP bid adapter
activate SSPMod

SSPMod -> SSPs : 4. ad request
activate SSPs

SSPs -> SSPs : 5. traffic quality controls

SSPs -> DSPs : 6. make bid requests
activate DSPs
DSPs --> SSPs : 7. respond with bids
deactivate DSPs

SSPs -> SSPs : 8. pub ad controls

SSPs --> SSPMod : 9. ad w/price
deactivate SSPs

SSPMod --> Prebid : 10. ad w/price
deactivate SSPMod

Prebid -> Prebid : 11. select appropriate ad

Prebid -> GAM : 12. configure k/v pair for selected ad
activate GAM

Prebid --> Pub : 13. wait for ad slot to load
deactivate Prebid

note over Pub,GAM
At this point control over the ad loading process is transferred from Prebid.js to GAM (final selection layer)
end note

Pub -> GAM : 14. load slot

GAM -> AdX : 15. ad request
activate AdX
AdX --> GAM : 16. respond with winning ad, which may be prebid.js line item
deactivate AdX

alt [GAM/AdX highest bid]
  GAM -> GAM : 17.1 render GAM/AdX result
else [Prebid.js highest bid]
  GAM -> GAM : 17.2 render selected SSP ad
end

GAM --> User : 18. show highest value advertisement

deactivate GAM
deactivate Pub
@enduml
```
